metadata.title: Unified AI Supervisory Control Plane (SCP) G-SIFI Control Catalog

controls.title: Post-Quantum WORM Logging
controls.description: All high-risk reasoning traces must be signed with ML-DSA-87 and persisted in a Merkle-anchored WORM log.

controls.title: Recursive ZK-Compliance Proofs
controls.description: Succinct, non-interactive proofs of GDL/Rego policy compliance for all agent reasoning steps.

controls.title: TEE Isolation
controls.description: Mandatory execution of the GSM and ZK Prover within memory-encrypted hardware enclaves.

controls.title: vTPM Remote Attestation
controls.description: Continuous verification of enclave integrity via vTPM PCR_MATCH heartbeats.

controls.title: SIP v3.0 Interaction Protocol
controls.description: Socratic interaction constraints to preserve human cognitive agency during human-agent collaboration.

controls.title: GIEN Mesh Equivocation Detection
controls.description: Zero-trust gossip protocol for detecting institutional log forks and agentic drift.
